news.headline: Global dry van container market to reach US$9.6 billion by 2033 with a 5.4% CAGR growth, APAC leading region.
news.summary: The global dry van containers market is expected to reach a valuation of US$9.6 billion by 2033, expanding at a CAGR of 5.4% from 2023. Asian countries like India, China, and Japan are forecasted to lead the market, driven by rapid industrialization and globalization. The North American and European regions are expected to compete for the second position in market share. The market currently stands at US$5.65 billion in 2023, with a projected CAGR of 4% from 2023 to 2033. Factors such as government initiatives, population growth, and import/export demands are driving market growth, though availability of alternative containers may hinder growth.

news.headline: Endo to present 7 new findings on Peyronie's disease and XIAFLEX at SMSNA Annual Meeting on Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: A press release from Endo, Inc. in Malvern on October 17, 2024 revealed that the company will present seven new studies on Peyronie's disease (PD) and XIAFLEX® at the upcoming Sexual Medicine Society. XIAFLEX® is a collagenase clostridium histolyticum (CCH) injection of 0.9 mg. The presentations will provide fresh insights into the treatment of PD with XIAFLEX®.

news.headline: S&T Bancorp Inc. reports $32.6M net income in Q3 2024, down from $34.4M in Q3 2023. $0.85 per diluted share vs $0.89.
news.summary: S&T Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: STBA), the parent company of S&T Bank, revealed a net income of $32.6 million, equivalent to $0.85 per diluted share, for the third quarter of 2024. This figure represents a decrease from the prior quarter's net income of $34.4 million, or $0.89 per diluted share. The announcement was made from Indiana, Pennsylvania on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Modivcare and Tenovi team up with Adherium to provide Hailie® Smart Inhalers for improved respiratory care.
news.summary: A partnership between Modivcare Inc., a prominent technology-driven healthcare service company, and Tenovi, a cellular-connected remote monitoring solutions provider, has been established to boost patient care. This collaboration aims to utilize Adherium’s Hailie® Smart inhalers for the improved treatment of patients. Modivcare, comprising Valued Relationships, Inc. (VRI) and Higi Care, LLC, will incorporate Tenovi’s innovative remote monitoring technology into their integrated supportive care solutions. This strategic alliance is set to revolutionize patient care by ensuring better management and monitoring.

news.headline: Canopy Growth reduces term loan by $100M, extends maturity to at least December 2026, improving balance sheet.
news.summary: Canopy Growth Corporation, a top cannabis company, headquartered in Smiths Falls, Ontario, revealed on October 17, 2024, that it had initiated an early prepayment. The company, traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol WEED and on the NASDAQ under CGC, is focused on utilizing cannabis to enhance quality of life globally.

news.headline: Autura and Traxero merge to enhance towing management software, optimizing tow lifecycle in a united platform.
news.summary: Boston-based Autura, a prominent government towing management software provider under Nexa Equity, and Traxero, a private towing solutions leader supported by Radian Capital, recently revealed their merger. The merger signifies the union of two leading platforms to create a comprehensive towing software platform that enhances every aspect of the tow lifecycle. With Autura and Traxero being recognized for their excellence in their respective markets, this collaboration aims to streamline operations and offer enhanced services.

news.headline: ManpowerGroup reports 3rd Quarter 2024 revenue of $4.5 billion (-3% as reported, -2% constant currency) with gross profit margin of 17.3%.
news.summary: Total revenues declined by 3% as reported, or 2% in constant currency, reaching $4.5 billion in the latest quarter. The North American and European markets continued to pose challenges, while there was strong demand in Latin America and the Asia-Pacific region. The gross profit margin stood at 17.3%. Staffing margins remained robust, and there was a positive trend in permanent placements.

news.headline: Essity faces early repayment demand for bonds maturing in 2029, 2030, 2031. Disputed by company.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, the Stockholm-based company Essity has reported that they are facing a request for premature payment from some bondholders concerning bonds that are set to mature in the years 2029, 2030, and 2031. This demand, disputed by Essity, pertains specifically to a small portion of the overall sum of bonds due in these respective years.

news.headline: APi Group will announce Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 31, 2024, before market opens. Conference call scheduled at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: In New Brighton, Minnesota, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) revealed its plan to unveil the financial results for the three and nine months concluding on September 30, 2024, before the market opens on Thursday, October 31, 2024. The company will host a webcast/dial-in conference call at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. Notable participants in the call will feature Russell A. Becker, President.

news.headline: Cresco Labs will announce its Q3 2024 financial results on November 8, 2024.
news.summary: Chicago-based company Cresco Labs has announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on November 8, 2024. The results are eagerly awaited by investors and analysts to gauge the company's performance during this period. Cresco Labs is expected to reveal key financial figures, including revenue, profits, and other important metrics that will provide insights into their business operations and growth trajectory. The disclosure of these numbers will have a significant impact on the company's stock performance and market perception in the coming days.

news.headline: ZenaDrone begins US flight testing of ZenaDrone 1000 in Arizona desert, with focus on new hardware and software configs, and expanding operations in the state.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZENA), a tech firm focusing on AI drone and enterprise SaaS solutions, has shared that its subsidiary, ZenaDrone, initiated the initial US flight trials of the ZenaDrone 1000 drone with updated hardware and software setups in the Arizona desert close to Phoenix. Alongside this testing, the company has been actively broadening its presence, activities, and collaborations in the region.

news.headline: Red Pine Exploration Inc. finds new high-grade veins north of Jubilee Deposit at Wawa Gold Project in Ontario. TSXV: RPX, OTCQB: RDEXF.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 17, 2024, Red Pine Exploration Inc. (TSXV: RPX, OTCQB: RDEXF) shared the early findings from its 2024 prospecting initiative on the Wawa Gold Project in Ontario.

news.headline: Bocana Resources Corp. granted extension by TSX-V for AGM, to be held before Jan 31, 2025. Expect updates soon.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 17, 2024, Bocana Resources Corp. disclosed that it has been granted an extension by the TSX Venture Exchange ("TSX-V") to conduct its annual shareholder meeting. The delay is due to potential shareholder approvals required for corporate decisions resulting from ongoing exploratory transactions. Bocana plans to convene its annual general meeting before January 31, 2025. Further information about the AGM will be provided in a forthcoming press release. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the tickers TSXV: BOCA and Frankfurt: VC1.

news.headline: Golconda Gold Ltd. reports 2,384 ounces of gold production in Q3 2024, up 50% from previous quarter.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 17, 2024, Golconda Gold Ltd. shared that they produced 2,384 ounces of gold in the third quarter of 2024 at their Galaxy Gold Mine. This marks a significant 50% boost in gold production compared to the quarter prior. Golconda Gold is listed on the TSX-V as GG and on the OTCQB as GGGOF.

news.headline: Theratechnologies' PROMISE-US trial reveals higher selection of Ibalizumab in heavily treated HIV patients with lower CD4 and high viral loads.
news.summary: Initial data indicates that there is a higher preference for Ibalizumab among patients with lower CD4 counts and higher viral loads, in comparison to other treatment regimens. This suggests that individuals with these specific parameters are opting for Ibalizumab more frequently than other available options.

news.headline: The Western Investment Company schedules Annual General and Special Meeting on December 6, 2024.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, The Western Investment Company will convene its Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. This meeting is a critical event for the company and its investors, where important decisions will be made regarding the future direction of the company. Shareholders are encouraged to attend and participate in the meeting, which will address key issues and opportunities. This meeting serves as a platform for shareholders to voice their opinions, ask questions, and vote on significant matters. The participation and engagement of shareholders are vital for the success and transparency of the company. Save the date and be part of shaping the future of The Western Investment Company.

news.headline: Antelope Enterprise acquires energy assets to tap into $33.6B US market, focusing on computing industries.
news.summary: The company is aiming to expand its reach in the sector by providing energy services to computing power industries. This move is expected to significantly increase its presence and influence in the market, potentially reaching a larger customer base and generating higher revenue. This strategic decision reflects the company's ambition to capitalize on the growing demand for energy in the computing sector. By targeting this specific industry, the company aims to solidify its position as a key player and potentially boost its market share in the sector. The company's plan is to leverage its expertise and resources to cater to the energy needs of computing power industries and establish itself as a prominent supplier in this field. This initiative is likely to result in a substantial increase in the company's overall production capacity and revenue streams.

news.headline: Anavex Life Sciences reveals promising initial biomarker findings from Phase 2 trial of ANAVEX®3-71 for schizophrenia.
Ocugen to discuss Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 8 at 8:30 AM ET in conference call and webcast.
news.summary: Malvern, Pennsylvania - Ocugen, Inc. (NASDAQ: OCGN), a biotech firm specializing in gene and cell therapies, biologics, and vaccines, will hold a conference call and live webcast to review its third quarter 2024 financial performance and offer a business update at 8:30 a.m. ET on November 8, 2024. The event aims to discuss the company's latest developments in the industry.

news.headline: Article discusses a patient who developed Anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis, treated effectively.
news.summary: In Cold Spring Harbor, New York on October 17, 2024, a peculiar scenario unfolded. Picture this - waking up in a hospital with no recollection of the past month. Medical professionals reveal that the individual experienced a sequence of intense outbursts and distrustful thoughts. It was believed that they had developed a belief that they had bipolar disorder. Subsequently, after a period of time...

news.headline: Papa Johns to host investor meeting on Dec 12, 2024 in Atlanta, with CEO Todd Penegor sharing insights from his first 100 days. Webcast available.
news.summary: Papa John's International, Inc. revealed plans to hold an analyst and investor meeting led by President and CEO Todd Penegor to discuss his initial 100 days with the company. The event, scheduled for December 12, 2024, in Atlanta at 10:00 am ET, will also feature a fireside chat with top executives. The meeting will be streamed live online. Todd Penegor and Chief Financial Officer Ravi Thanawala are expected to provide key insights during the session. Papa John's stock is traded on Nasdaq under the symbol PZZA.

news.headline: TSMC earnings expected to boost tech stocks, S&P 500 up 0.42% in premarket trading with positive sentiment in market.
news.summary: The article discusses how technology stocks, particularly chipmakers, are expected to perform well following strong third-quarter earnings from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. This has boosted positive sentiment towards artificial intelligence plays. Oil prices and gold prices have increased, while bond yields have remained steady. Key economic data such as retail sales, manufacturing activity, industrial production, and jobless claims are anticipated to impact the market. Futures for major indices show positive trends, with the Nasdaq 100 at +0.81%, S&P 500 at +0.42%, Dow at +0.11%, and Russell 2000 at -0.09%. In premarket trading, SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust rose by 0.42% to $584.76 and Invesco QQQ ETF surged by 0.83% to $495. Netflix's earnings report after market close is expected to influence tech stock reporting.In the prior session, small-cap stocks surged, major indices ended in the green with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching a fresh high. S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite gained momentum later in the day. Notably, only communication services and consumer discretionary stocks declined.  Index performance saw Nasdaq Composite at +0.28% (18,367.08), S&P 500 Index at +0.47% (5,842.47), Dow Industrials at +0.79 (43,077.70), and Russell 2000 at +1.64% (2,286.68). Analysts highlight the recent small-cap rally and the potential for continued market movements.

news.headline: Ireland chosen to host 28th TCI Global Conference in 2025, succeeding Chihuahua, Mexico. John Hobbs involved in handover.
news.summary: The 27th TCI Network Global Conference, which took place in Chihuahua, Mexico, recently concluded, handing over the baton to Ireland to host the global cluster meeting in 2025. John Hobbs of Munster, Ireland, was present at the handover ceremony.

news.headline: Travellers' stock jumps to new highs as earnings triple and profitability rises sharply.
Kyrio chooses Averna's Jupiter Platform for DOCSIS 4.0 cert. Averna is a leader in test solutions. (Characters: 82)
news.summary: A leading global provider of test and quality solutions, Averna, revealed today that Kyrio® has chosen its Jupiter platform as the primary tool for validating and certifying all future CPE. This decision was announced on October 17, 2024, in Montreal. The Jupiter platform will now serve as the designated solution for these processes.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelensky: I told Trump that Ukraine has only two options: either nuclear weapons or NATO membership.
ASMO expands in Saudi with 16 MoUs in various sectors worth over SAR 300 million, including partnerships with Aramco Digital, SAP, and Oracle.
news.summary: Collaborations in the energy, chemicals, refining, industrial, healthcare, and aviation sectors are set to expand as 16 Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) have been signed with top companies. Partnerships with Aramco Digital, SAP, and Oracle are worth more than SAR 300 million (over USD 81 million) focusing on digital transformation and enhancement of various sectors.

news.headline: Fusion Connect appoints Jim Delis as Chief Revenue Officer to drive customer-centric growth; enhancing leadership team.
news.summary: Fusion Connect has further expanded its leadership team with proven executive expertise in Atlanta on October 17, 2024. The prominent cloud communications provider welcomes Jim Delis to its executive leadership team. This move underscores Fusion Connect's commitment to enhancing its executive talent pool with experienced professionals.

news.headline: Vietjet Thailand awarded 'Best International Low-Cost Airline Brand - Thailand' at Global Brand Awards 2024.
news.summary: Vietjet Thailand has been honored with the 'Best International Low-Cost Airline Brand, Thailand' award in 2024 at the respected Global Brand Awards. The event took place in London on October 17, 2024, organized by Global Brands Magazine (GBM) headquartered in the United Kingdom. This recognition highlights the airline's outstanding performance in the industry.

news.headline: NEXiCONN AI Pixel-Plus CaptureX NV601/NV501 offers 4K Ultra HD & simultaneous four-platform streaming.
news.summary: In Tokyo, a recent press release highlighted the product offerings of NEXiCONN Technology Corporation. Specializing in cutting-edge tech solutions, the company showcases their innovative products through this introduction article. Stay tuned for more updates on the latest advancements in technology and product launches from NEXiCONN.

news.headline: Data Communications Management Corp. released its first ESG Report outlining commitments like lowering GHG emissions.
news.summary: DCM Corp, a top provider of marketing and business communication solutions in North America, unveiled its first Environmental, Social, and Governance Report. The report highlights four primary commitments: reducing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions through science-based targets, assisting in increasing data responsibility, supporting charitable actions, and promoting diversity in the workplace. The company, traded as TSX: DCM and OTCQX: DCMDF, aims to enhance its sustainability efforts and community engagement.

news.headline: Laser Photonics (NASDAQ: LASE) to join Brokk Australia at IMARC 2024 in Sydney, Australia's largest mining event with 9,000 attendees.
news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC) (NASDAQ: LASE), a prominent industrial laser systems developer, will be collaborating with Brokk Australia at the International Mining and Resources Conference (IMARC) in Orlando, Fla. This conference, now in its 11th year, is Australia's largest mining event and is set to welcome over 9,000 attendees. LPC specializes in laser cleaning and various material processing applications, contributing to critical discussions and innovation in the global mining and resources sector.

news.headline: Funnel partners with Monument Real Estate Services to implement AI CRM for 6,000 units, enhancing renter experience.
news.summary: A renter-focused CRM and AI platform has been implemented in a complete 6,000-unit property portfolio based in Tampa, Florida. Funnel Leasing, a top multifamily CRM with AI integration, revealed their latest client, Monument Real Estate Services (MRES), a company specializing in asset and property management. This new development was shared on October 17, 2024, showcasing the widespread adoption of this technology across a large number of residential units.

news.headline: USU ranked as leader in 2024 IT Service Management Tools by QKS Group, with strong ratings across technology and customer experience.
news.summary: The QKS Group SPARK Matrix™ recently conducted a competitive analysis and ranking of top vendors in IT Service Management Tools. Among them, USU stands out for its exceptional technology and customer experience management, earning high ratings in technology excellence and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Climate tech investors are cautious amidst US Election uncertainties. Key figures on hold.
Appili Therapeutics discusses progress of ATI-1701 biodefense vaccine at IDWeek™ 2024, showcasing promising results.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that more than 70% of adults in the United States have received at least one dose of the COVID-19 vaccine. Additionally, the research found that over 50% of the population is fully vaccinated, with the remaining individuals either partially vaccinated or unvaccinated. The study also highlighted that vaccination rates vary across different regions and demographics, with certain groups lagging behind in immunization efforts. Experts emphasize the importance of continued vaccination efforts to reach herd immunity and combat the spread of the virus effectively.

news.headline: Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) will release Q3 2024 earnings on October 31, 2024, followed by 8:30 am ET conference call.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) has announced that it will disclose its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 31, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call will follow at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, where management will discuss the company's financial and operational standings. The conference call can be accessed through a live webcast on Driven Brands' Investor Relations page at investors.drivenbrands.com. A recorded version of the call will also be accessible later on.

news.headline: Draganfly will showcase drone innovations at Wings of Saskatchewan in Regina on Oct 30-31, promoting industry collaboration.
news.summary: The latest developments in drone technology will be showcased at a prominent aviation trade show, emphasizing cooperation between different sectors.

news.headline: Harris and Trump discuss key issues on TV show, sharing their views with a wide audience.
Domino's Pizza appoints Kate Trumbull as EVP & CMO from Nov 1, 2024. Trumbull will lead marketing for the world's largest pizza company.
news.summary: A leading pizza company headquartered in Ann Arbor, Michigan disclosed on October 17, 2024, that Kate Trumbull has been promoted as the Executive Vice President, Chief Marketing Officer. Effective from November 1, 2024, Trumbull, who will assume this role, will be accountable for managing various marketing activities of the company. This company, known as Domino's Pizza Inc., holds the title of being the largest pizza company globally and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DPZ.

news.headline: Hypha Labs launching Micro Pearls™ for mushrooms to revolutionize market, likened to Keurig for coffee.
news.summary: Hypha Labs has developed an innovative product called Micro Pearls™, which has the potential to revolutionize the mushroom industry much like Keurig did for coffee. This groundbreaking technology by Hypha Labs aims to enhance the growth and cultivation of mushrooms, resulting in a significant increase in production efficiency. With Micro Pearls™, growers can expect to see a dramatic improvement in yields, with estimates suggesting a boost of up to 30%. The product has already garnered a lot of attention within the agricultural sector, offering a promising solution for mushroom farmers looking to optimize their operations and output.

news.headline: Pivotree speeds up time to market for electronics industry with innovative solutions.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has risen to 5.7%, affecting approximately 190 million people around the world. The COVID-19 pandemic has played a significant role in this increase, with many industries facing closures and layoffs. The situation is particularly dire for young people, as the youth unemployment rate is at 13.1%. The report also highlighted disparities in employment between men and women, with women being disproportionately affected. Governments are being urged to take action to address these alarming trends and prevent further economic challenges.

news.headline: PPG to sell U.S. and Canada architectural coatings business for $550M to AIP, announces cost reduction program, closing in late 2024/early 2025.
news.summary: PPG, a major player in paints, coatings, and specialty materials, recently disclosed its plan to sell off its entire architectural coatings division in the U.S. and Canada. The company has struck a definitive deal with American Industrial Partners (AIP), an industrial investor, for a substantial sum of $550 million. The transaction, slated to be finalized towards the end of 2024 or early 2025 pending standard closing prerequisites, comes as part of PPG’s strategic review process.

news.headline: Calian Group Ltd. meets global defence demand, signs contracts worth $25 million in Q4, fiscal year 2024 closes.
news.summary: Calian Group Ltd. concluded its fiscal year of 2024 with the final quarter showcasing a significant achievement by securing multiple defense contracts worth around $25 million.

news.headline: Cyngn's 12,000 lb. DriveMod Tugger deployed with major customer, automotive manufacturer; upgrade announced.
news.summary: A California-based technology company, Cyngn Inc., revealed on October 17, 2024, the launch of its upgraded DriveMod Tugger model with an increased towing capacity of 12,000 pounds. Trading under the symbol Nasdaq: CYN, Cyngn secured a significant commercial deal with a major manufacturing customer for this advanced product.

news.headline: Rockwell Automation appoints Brian Hovey as CMO, responsible for global marketing of its portfolio.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Rockwell Automation disclosed the appointment of Brian Hovey as the Vice President of Global Marketing and Chief Marketing Officer. As the world's leading company specializing in industrial automation and digital transformation, Rockwell Automation (NYSE:ROK) highlighted Hovey's new role in overseeing the marketing strategy for its entire product range worldwide. Reporting to Scott Genereux, the Senior Vice President and Chief Revenue Officer, Hovey is tasked with spearheading efforts to generate demand and enhance the company's brand presence on a global scale.

news.headline: Ziff Davis (NASDAQ: ZD) to reveal Q3 2024 earnings Nov 7, with an audio webcast on Nov 8 featuring CEO and CFO.
news.summary: Ziff Davis, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZD) is set to announce its Third Quarter 2024 Earnings on Thursday, November 7, 2024, at 6:00PM ET. Interested individuals, including the public, press, financial community, shareholders, and others, are invited to tune in to the live audio webcast of the earnings call on Friday, November 8, 2024, at 8:30AM ET. The call will be hosted by Vivek Shah, Chief Executive Officer, and Bret Richter, Chief Financial Officer.

news.headline: Identiv (NASDAQ: INVE) announces Q3 2024 earnings call on Nov 7, 2024, 5:00 PM EST. Financial results discussed. Website for details.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California, Identiv, Inc., known for its RFID solutions for the Internet of Things, will conduct a teleconference and webcast on November 7, 2024, at 5:00 PM EST to review its financial performance for the third quarter concluded on September 30, 2024. The company's financial results will be shared in a press release before the call and can be accessed in the investor relations segment of the company's site. The event is scheduled as the Third Quarter 2024 Earnings Teleconference. Identiv, Inc. trades on NASDAQ under the symbol INVE.

news.headline: Vyvo Smart Chain introduces VAI OS AI platform for data management, leveraging blockchain tech.530 characters.
news.summary: In Singapore, Vyvo Smart Chain revealed the launch of VAI OS, an artificial intelligence platform focused on enhancing data management across various sectors. Utilizing Vyvo's blockchain tech, VAI OS provides AI-powered tools enabling users to securely and privately handle, regulate, and capitalize on their data. Building on Vyvo's tech expertise, it expands on previous products like the BioSense Band, BioSense Ring, and initiatives like Nut. This innovation aims to revolutionize data usage with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Instil Inc. launches Major Gift Solution for Enterprise Nonprofits in Los Angeles to boost managing major donor portfolios.
news.summary: Instil Inc., a prominent provider of innovative solutions for nonprofits, has introduced the Major Gift Solution for Enterprise Nonprofits in Los Angeles. Tailored for organizations concentrating on major gifts and utilizing Salesforce, this solution equips nonprofits with modern features such as opportunity forecasting, advanced moves, portfolio management, and more. Through this tool, nonprofits can enhance the management of their major donor portfolios.
